capabilities.name: Stale-deal check
capabilities.verify: stale-deal detection logic in deals module

capabilities.name: Stage flow (data-driven)
capabilities.notes: Superseded by custom_stages — pipeline_stages(entity_type='deal') is the source of truth and PipelineStagesPage lets admins edit stages.

capabilities.name: Configurable pipeline stages
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: DealKanban reads pipeline_stages (Lovable S2), enum<->stage_id sync trigger live; manage_pipeline_stage runtime-verified.

capabilities.name: Stage probability weighting
capabilities.verify: pipeline_stages.probability seeded per deal stage; weighted-pipeline query verified (=110000 in test)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: lead_pipeline_review forecast via agent-execute matches SQL (weighted=1800000); per-stage breakdown included.

capabilities.name: Deal/quote templates
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table deal_templates (name, default_product_id, default_stage/id, default_value_cents, default_currency, default_team_id, default_notes). RPC create_deal_from_template(p_template_id,p_lead_id,...) spins up a deal atomically. UI: DealTemplatesPanel (Setup drawer on DealsPage) with CRUD + 'Use' launcher.

capabilities.name: Deal team assignment
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Tables deal_teams + deal_team_members (same pattern as ticket_teams). deals.team_id nullable FK. UI: DealTeamsPanel CRUD in Setup drawer, team filter Select in DealsPage header, team selector in DealDetailPage sidebar.

capabilities.name: Lost-reason codes
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 after the read-path fix deployed (Stage-3): manage_deal action=get (new) returned the closed_lost test deal WITH lost_reason='other', lost_note and closed_at visible — the fields an earlier run proved were written but hidden. Write path verified 2026-07-05 (stage=lost stores lost_reason, echoed). WRITE PATH LIVE-VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-05 (Stage-3): manage_deal update stage=lost normalized to closed_lost and stored lost_reason='price' (echoed in the response); move_stage closed_lost with lost_reason='other' also worked. deals.lost_reason/lost_note (migration 20260704110000); LostReasonDialog prompts on closed_lost (DealKanban drop, DealsPage table select, DealDetailPage select); useUpdateDeal clears closed_at+lost fields on re-open to an active stage; manage_deal update/move_stage accept lost_reason/lost_note with clear-on-reopen (agent-execute executeDealsAction); reason shown on DealDetailPage; feeds lead_pipeline_review win_loss rollup
capabilities.notes: Read-path bug (fields missing from list select; no get action) caught live 2026-07-05, fixed in agent-execute, redeployed and re-verified. Clear-on-reopen implemented in applyLostDiscipline (shared by update + move_stage).

capabilities.name: Deal change history
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table deal_history (deal_id, field, old_value, new_value, changed_by, changed_at). AFTER UPDATE trigger tg_log_deal_history iterates stage/stage_id/value_cents/currency/lead_id/product_id/team_id/owner_id/expected_close/notes/lost_reason and logs one row per changed field. UI: DealHistoryTimeline on DealDetailPage.

capabilities.name: Multi-currency auto-conversion
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Postgres helper convert_amount_to_base(cents,from,to) uses the latest exchange_rates row (direct or inverse). Client helper convertAmount() + useLatestExchangeRates/useBaseCurrency hooks. DealsPage table + DealDetailPage header render ≈ converted amount in base currency when deal.currency differs.
